title: Northeastern University
content: Nishanth is pursuing a Master of Science in Data Analytics Engineering at Northeastern University in Boston, Massachusetts, with expected graduation in December 2026.

title: Relevant Graduate Coursework
content: Relevant graduate coursework includes Neural Networks and Deep Learning, Applied Natural Language Processing, and Data Mining in Engineering.

title: SRM Institute of Science and Technology
content: He completed a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science at SRM Institute of Science and Technology in Chennai, India, from June 2020 to June 2024.
